name: Harvest Time Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 6 small Carrots; peeled & cut into 2-inch pieces
1 medium Acorn squash; cut in half lengthwise, then seeded &
2 medium Apple, cooking; cut into wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the roast in oil in a heavy Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper; add water. Cook, covered, 1 hour.
3. Add potatoes, carrots, onion, squash, and chervil; cook 25 minutes.
4. Add apples; cook 10 minutes.
5. Remove the meat, vegetables, and apples to a heated platter and keep warm.
6. Add vinegar and gravy mix to 1 1/2 cups of the remaining liquid.
7. Simmer, stirring constantly, for 1 minute or until thickened.
8. Serve with the meat and vegetables.
